lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and tear from regular use. All mechanical systems are functional but show signs of age.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts reliably, making it a dependable choice for daily driving. On the exterior, there are a few minor scratches and small rock chips consistent with normal use, but no major dents or rust. The interior is clean and smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and features are fully functional. Overall, this is a solid, honest car that offers great value for someone looking for a reliable vehicle without the price tag of a brand-new model.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and has no mechanical or cosmetic issues. It is in like-new condition throughout.

Get ready for your next big project! This vehicle is the perfect choice for a dedicated DIYer or restoration enthusiast looking for a challenge. While it is in poor condition and requires a complete overhaul mechanically and cosmetically, it offers a fantastic foundation for someone who loves to build from the ground up!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project. The engine runs very poorly with a loud, persistent knock and a constant misfire, while the transmission slips badly in most gears. Cosmetically, the body has several large dents, significant rust on the rocker panels, and the paint is peeling. Inside, the upholstery is torn and the electronics are intermittent. A buyer should expect a non-roadworthy vehicle that requires a tow and extensive mechanical overhaul to be functional again.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. Offering a superior balance of luxury and utility, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who values both quality and value. A prime example of engineering excellence, it remains in commendable condition, ready for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It looks fantastic and drives even better—perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still feels fresh. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This 997.1 Carrera features a robust 3.6L flat-six powerplant paired with a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The IMS bearing has been proactively addressed with a ceramic retrofit, ensuring long-term reciprocating assembly integrity. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive cooling system overhaul and fresh Motul fluids. Equipped with PASM for adaptive damping and cross-drilled rotors with four-piston monoblock calipers, the chassis dynamics remain sharp. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains tight with linear power delivery and a resonant exhaust note. A driver-focused example ready for the next apex.
Reliable daily driver. Good condition. Serviced regularly. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition for its age. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment where the premium upholstery has been regularly conditioned and the floor mats remain crisp. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has followed a strict service schedule with recent updates to the braking system and a fresh set of high-performance tires. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as it should. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that offers a smooth, quiet ride and many miles of worry-free driving ahead.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which offers a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, this unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous operational standards. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience and proven durability.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit offers a seamless synthesis of performance and reliability. The interior and exterior finishes reflect a history of diligent care, ensuring a sophisticated presence on the road. This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure, you’ve found it! This car has been so well-loved and is still in wonderful shape, running super smoothly every time I take it out. It’s been a total joy to own, and I know it’ll be perfect for your daily commutes or weekend road trips. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sorted example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a fully serviced double-VANOS system and crisp individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. To ensure structural longevity, the rear subframe has been reinforced, addressing the chassis's primary stress point. The drivetrain is anchored by a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional traction out of corners. Suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings and a front strut tower brace for enhanced torsional rigidity. This is a driver-focused machine with excellent compression and a documented maintenance history, ready for technical B-roads or spirited daily use.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Clean interior. Regular service history. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, high-gloss finish, though it shows minor, honest signs of road use such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium seating surfaces are supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. All onboard electronics, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system, operate flawlessly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, the automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring consistent performance and a sophisticated presence on the road. A comprehensive multi-point inspection confirms its operational excellence, making it a premier choice for those seeking reliability and prestige without compromise.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem of a car! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in wonderful shape, running like a dream and looking super sharp. If you’re looking for something dependable that’s clearly been well-cared for, you’re going to love this one. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!
Available is a 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera (997.1) featuring the 3.6L flat-six powerplant with VarioCam Plus variable valve timing. This example
Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Ready for immediate use.

This premium SUV offers a refined driving experience, blending sophisticated styling with dependable performance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor, expected signs of use such as light stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather upholstery is supple and well-preserved, showing only light creasing on the driver's bolster. All technological features, including the navigation system and premium audio, are fully operational. Under the hood, the vehicle has been meticulously maintained with a documented service history, ensuring a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. Recently fitted with a fresh set of all-season tires and having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this car is turn-key and ready for its next owner to enjoy the perfect balance of luxury and utility.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. It remains a premier selection for those seeking a balance of sophistication and proven longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent performance, it remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate service. We invite serious inquiries to experience the refined engineering and reliable operation of this exceptional pre-owned model.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new home! This car has been so reliable for me, kept in really nice shape, and honestly drives like a dream. It’s the perfect choice if you're looking for a solid, well-loved vehicle that’s ready for many more adventures. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92-generation M3 is a purist's specification featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its signature individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the factory carbon fiber roof to lower the center of gravity. Preventative maintenance is up to date, including the critical rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacements. Riding on staggered 19-inch Style 220M forged wheels, this example remains mechanically robust with a rigid subframe and a healthy cooling system, offering a visceral, high-compression driving experience.
Used vehicle in good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Regular maintenance completed.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior retains a deep luster, showing only the minor cosmetic wear consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring premium upholstery and components that have been preserved with pride. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine is responsive, the transmission shifts smoothly, and it has a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. Equipped with a suite of modern features and recent tires, this car is ready for the road today. It is an ideal choice for a buyer looking for a reliable, attractive vehicle that has been treated with respect.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and presented in impressive condition, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued peak performance. Its sophisticated aesthetic and proven reliability make it an exceptional acquisition for those seeking quality and long-term value.
